{{ .Chart.Name }} {{ .Chart.AppVersion }} has been installed.

The operator is running in namespace "{{ .Release.Namespace }}".

Next steps:

  1. Verify the controller is ready:

       kubectl -n {{ .Release.Namespace }} rollout status deploy/{{ .Release.Name }}-controller-manager

  2. Create a TemporalCluster (see examples in the project repository):

       kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bmorton/temporal-operator/main/config/samples/temporal_v1alpha1_temporalcluster.yaml

  3. Watch it become ready:

       kubectl get temporalcluster -w

{{- if .Values.webhook.enable }}

Webhooks are enabled. cert-manager must be installed in the cluster.
{{- end }}

Documentation: https://github.com/bmorton/temporal-operator
